revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
Undid revision 1068278924 by [[Special:Contributions/Jonesey95|Jonesey95]] ([[User talk:Jonesey95|talk]]). Restore div tags per report at [[Template talk:S-line]]
revision.text:
{{#if:{{{hide1|}}}||{{S-line/side cell|through={{{through1|}}}|state={{{state1|}}}|branch={{{branch|}}}|next={{{previous|}}}|link={{{link1|}}}|system={{{system|}}}|line={{{line|}}}|note={{{note|}}}|type={{{type|}}}|oneway={{{oneway1|}}}|round={{{round1|}}}|circular={{#if:{{{circular|}}}|1|{{{circular1|}}}}}|side=left}} }}{{#if:{{{hidemid|}}}|| }}{{#if:{{{hidemid|}}}||{{#ifeq:{{{line}}}|{{{{{system}}} lines|{{{line}}}}}|{{{line}}}|{{{{{system}}} lines|{{{line}}}}}}}{{#if:{{{branch|}}}|

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
